title: Smoked Lemongrass Australian Lemongrass Wrap
description: Peppery, shaggy, nostalgic Australian dish featuring lemongrass, cooked in a ttukbaegi earthenware cook with a corn husk wrap.
instructions: Preheat the ttukbaegi earthenware cook to 4009c.
Mix together cumin, coriander, salt, and pepper in a small bowl.
Shred the smoked chicken and mix with mint and cumin-corainder mix.
Cut the lemongrass stalks into 1-inch pieces and add to the chicken mixture.
Heat coconut oil in the preheated cook and add the chicken mixture. Cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Warm the corn husks by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Spread a small amount of honey on the center of a corn husk, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Place a portion of the chicken mixture onto the center of the corn husk, leaving a small border around the filling.
Fold the sides of the corn husk over the filling and then roll the wrap up tightly.
Repeat with remaining ingredients and serve immediately.
